creator: jack.pappas@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 144246
Patch to update lang/fsharp port to 3.1.1.19

I've updated the lang/fsharp port to 3.1.1.19, the latest stable release in the F# 3.1 branch. Tested with lang/mono 3.4.0_1 on FreeBSD 10-RELEASE amd64, but I don't expect problems on any other FreeBSD versions or architectures.
